title: This Portfolio
description: The site you're looking at. A containerized multi-project platform running on a single droplet — Docker Compose, Nginx reverse proxy, CI/CD via GitHub Actions, and auto-generated infrastructure documentation.
descriptionDa: Siden du kigger på nu. En containeriseret multi-projekt platform der kører på en enkelt droplet — Docker Compose, Nginx reverse proxy, CI/CD via GitHub Actions og auto-genereret infrastruktur-dokumentation.

title: Gabel Gundogs
description: A customer website + CMS I built and operate in production for a Danish gundog kennel. Deliberately right-sized: Next.js with embedded Payload CMS, SQLite, and a single Azure VM behind Caddy with automatic TLS. Delivery runs through a staged GitHub Actions pipeline — lint, typecheck, unit tests, Playwright E2E, and a Docker build gate before images ship to GHCR — and nightly backups go to Azure Blob Storage with a documented, tested restore procedure.
descriptionDa: Et kundesite + CMS, som jeg har bygget og driver i produktion for en dansk jagthundekennel. Bevidst right-sized: Next.js med indbygget Payload CMS, SQLite og én Azure VM bag Caddy med automatisk TLS. Leverancen kører gennem en staged GitHub Actions-pipeline — lint, typecheck, unit tests, Playwright E2E og en Docker build-gate før images sendes til GHCR — og natlige backups går til Azure Blob Storage med en dokumenteret, afprøvet restore-procedure.

title: MonkKnows
description: A legacy application I modernized into production with a full DevOps toolchain: containerized with Docker Compose, CI/CD via GitHub Actions (lint, audit, tests, E2E), image and dependency scanning, and a Prometheus + Grafana observability stack with availability and SLA tracking. Built collaboratively with a PR-based workflow, ADRs, and runbooks, and deployed to Azure VMs. The platform has since been decommissioned, but the repository preserves the full CI/CD, observability, and team-workflow history.
descriptionDa: En legacy-applikation jeg moderniserede til produktion med en fuld DevOps-værktøjskæde: containeriseret med Docker Compose, CI/CD via GitHub Actions (lint, audit, tests, E2E), image- og dependency-scanning og en Prometheus + Grafana observability-stak med availability- og SLA-måling. Bygget i samarbejde med PR-baseret workflow, ADRs og runbooks, og deployet til Azure-VMs. Platformen er sidenhen nedlagt, men repoet bevarer hele CI/CD-, observability- og team-workflow-historikken.

title: Raid Fines
description: A full-stack World of Warcraft raid-fine platform I operate in production: a React + TypeScript SPA and a Spring Boot (Java 21) API with Battle.net OAuth2/JWT login, Warcraft Logs GraphQL integration, MobilePay payments, and an in-game Lua addon. Containerized and deployed to the live droplet via GitHub Actions.
descriptionDa: En full-stack World of Warcraft raid-bødeplatform, som jeg driver i produktion: en React + TypeScript SPA og et Spring Boot (Java 21) API med Battle.net OAuth2/JWT-login, Warcraft Logs GraphQL-integration, MobilePay-betaling og en in-game Lua-addon. Containeriseret og deployet til den live droplet via GitHub Actions.

title: Talent API
description: A Spring Boot (Java 21) REST API built for a Danish internship challenge — but the real story is the delivery pipeline: GitHub Actions with quality gates (JaCoCo, Checkstyle, SpotBugs), images published to GHCR, and an automated deploy to the live droplet. Documented with Swagger / OpenAPI.
descriptionDa: Et Spring Boot (Java 21) REST API bygget til en dansk praktik-udfordring — men den egentlige historie er leverancepipelinen: GitHub Actions med kvalitetsgates (JaCoCo, Checkstyle, SpotBugs), images publiceret til GHCR og en automatisk deploy til den live droplet. Dokumenteret med Swagger / OpenAPI.

title: Insolvens Intelligence
description: A hybrid RAG system for insolvency law research. Combines graph-RAG (company ownership structures from CVR) with vector-RAG (Danish court rulings) and transaction analysis via an AI agent in n8n. Neo4j serves as both graph and vector database — 61 companies, 989 rulings, and 46,000+ embedded chunks.
descriptionDa: Et hybrid RAG-system til insolvensretlig research. Kombinerer graf-RAG (ejerskabsstrukturer fra CVR) med vektor-RAG (danske domstolsafgørelser) og transaktionsanalyse via en AI-agent i n8n. Neo4j fungerer som både graf- og vektordatabase — 61 selskaber, 989 afgørelser og 46.000+ embeddede chunks.

title: Web Crawler
description: A configurable web crawler with visual output. Crawls a target domain, maps URL relationships, and renders an interactive D3.js network visualization.
descriptionDa: En konfigurerbar webcrawler med visuel output. Crawler et måldomæne, kortlægger URL-relationer og renderer en interaktiv D3.js netværksvisualisering.

title: Beskyttelsesrum Danmark
description: An interactive overview of Danish civil protection shelters. Browse municipalities, view capacity reports, explore an interactive map, and manage maintenance schedules.
descriptionDa: Et interaktivt overblik over danske beskyttelsesrum. Gennemse kommuner, se kapacitetsrapporter, udforsk et interaktivt kort og administrer vedligeholdelsesplaner.
